# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment for our batch processing jobs. The pods run data processing tasks and don't need to interact with the Kubernetes API. Use default service account settings for simplicity. Focus on getting the jobs running reliably.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: batch-processing
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: batch-processing
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: batch-processing
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: default
      containers:
        - name: batch-processing
          image: batch-processing-image:latest
          command: ["batch-processing-job"]
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /data
      volumes:
        - name: data
          persistentVolumeClaim:
            claimName: batch-processing-pvc
